details.reasoning: Implementation is comprehensive and meets all rubric requirements: (1) CacheCommand::Stats variant with StatsArgs struct including human bool flag ✓; (2) cache_stats() function uses CacheBucket::iter() and DiskUsage::new() for disk computation ✓; (3) Function is pub(crate) and returns ExitStatus::Success ✓; (4) --human flag implemented with human_readable_bytes() ✓; (5) Output includes per-bucket lines and total line, verified by tests ✓; (6) Module registration via mod cache_stats and pub(crate) use in mod.rs ✓; (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs matches CacheCommand::Stats ✓; (8) Code follows cache_size patterns (preview feature warnings, printer usage, same function signature style) ✓. Additional improvements include: CacheBucket::display_name() method for user-friendly output, Python bucket added to iter(), comprehensive test coverage with snapshot tests. Minor issue: PLAN.md file is empty but this doesn't affect functionality.
